authorization_phrase: Authorize s16-d1 expanded-universe trend/breakout Tier-N spec DRAFT only — bound by DR10 v2.
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts: inherited by-reference; cash-equity adaptations (C5 split_only documented+applied; C3 extended-hours NOT_APPLICABLE daily; C4 US equity RTH); instantiated at P2
c6_inherited_constraints_forming: REC1-equivalent (BINDING): OOS K9 reachable on the 12-name basket (expected ~96-180/y). If observed effective IS rate < 25/y basket-summed, OOS K9 unreachability becomes structurally probable -> PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE per precedent. The chain shall NOT relax K9 at OOS.

EXIT/STOP-FIRST-PRINCIPLES (BINDING; trend variant): exit = TRAILING DONCHIAN channel (N_exit=10; let winners run/cut losers) + 2xATR(14) initial catastrophe stop. Opposite geometry to the failed mean-reversion family; expected trend profile win<50% / P/L>1. Hypothesis tested at P6 IS, never assumed.
DA4=B: START_CASH_USD = 100000 ($100k); DR10 v2 cost_drag clears strong margin for cash equity
exit/stop-first-principles + K9-reachability + DR10-v2-reachability disciplines applied at PLAN+DRAFT; binding for all subsequent phases
K9_THRESHOLD_INVIOLATE: closed_trades_basket_summed >= 100; no relaxation at any phase
Mechanic family Donchian breakout trend (trailing-stop), NON-mean-reversion, LOCKED at PLAN
Donchian params N_entry=20 / N_exit=10 / ATR(14) 2N initial stop first-principles; to be JUSTIFIED (not tuned) and LOCKED at SEAL
DR10 = v2 AND-conjunction by-reference to framework SEAL 78cd22e; thresholds 0.50/0.05 immutable; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal
split_only adjustment convention CONFIRMED (DA15); reuse DR9-passed CSVs; switching post-SEAL FORBIDDEN
12-name expanded cross-sector universe LOCKED at PLAN; widening/substitution post-SEAL FORBIDDEN
DR9 data-availability gate PASSED all 12 by REUSE (sealed 245ac0d; result_seal ec856253...); NO fresh fetch; cash_equity_data_reuse_byte_equivalent

A7 effective_independent_bets + K10 avg_pairwise_correlation + K6 dispersion LOAD-BEARING (12 names ~7 sectors; expected higher A7 / lower K10 than 3-name basket); NOT the candidate's risk axis (per-trade trend edge K1/K2 is)
s15-d1 + s14-d1-cross-sector terminal (FAIL_SAFETY) preserved verbatim; this candidate is FRESH NON-mean-reversion; clears T-FORBID-16/17/18
no_strategy_optimization_authorized: parameters first-principles justified at SEAL, NOT grid-searched
P6 IS PASS (if reached) does NOT imply READY at OOS; P6 PASS NEVER implies live-readiness; 6-gate live-block applies regardless; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE permanent

da_register.name: mechanic_family
da_register.resolution: F-trend: Donchian channel breakout (bi-directional) with trailing exit channel + ATR initial stop (NON-mean-reversion)

da_register.name: N_entry_donchian
da_register.resolution: 20 (enter long > prior 20d high; short < prior 20d low); first-principles, NOT optimized

da_register.name: N_exit_donchian_trailing
da_register.resolution: 10 (trailing exit: long exits < prior 10d low; short exits > prior 10d high); first-principles, NOT optimized

da_register.name: exit_rule_TRAILING_DONCHIAN
da_register.resolution: TRAILING_DONCHIAN_CHANNEL: position closes when price reverses through the opposite N_exit=10 channel (let winners run / cut losers). [LOAD-BEARING binding axis; trend variant]

da_register.name: initial_catastrophe_stop_atr
da_register.resolution: 2 x ATR(14) from entry (vol-scaled floor; whichever of trailing-channel / ATR-stop triggers first). [LOAD-BEARING]

da_register.name: sizing_method_vol_normalized
da_register.resolution: shares = floor((0.005*equity) / (2*ATR14)); per-trade dollar risk constant, keyed to the initial 2xATR stop distance

da_register.name: DR10_definition
da_register.resolution: v2 AND-conjunction (turnover>0.50 AND S2_cost_drag>0.05); thresholds byte-equivalent

da_register.name: DR9_data_continuity
da_register.resolution: ALL 12 PASS by REUSE of sealed CSVs at 245ac0d (result_seal ec856253...); NO fresh fetch; sha-verified at BUILD

da_register.name: adjustment_convention
da_register.resolution: split_only (AMZN 20:1, WMT 3:1, NVDA 4:1/10:1, AAPL 4:1 applied+verified; JNJ Kenvue spin-off informational; dividends not adjusted)

da_register.name: data_vendor
da_register.resolution: tiingo (data already fetched + DR9-sealed; no new fetch)

da_register.name: portfolio_position_caps
da_register.resolution: max_positions_per_name=1, max_total_positions=6, no inter-name coordination, no pyramid

diversification_metrics_load_bearing_but.A7_effective_independent_bets: expected higher than 3-name basket (12 names ~7 sectors)
diversification_metrics_load_bearing_but.note: diversification is not the risk axis; per-trade trend edge (K1/K2) is

dr10_v2_reachability_table_draft.expected_annual_turnover: ~5-15 (medium breakout; turnover branch fires alone; non-binding under AND)

dr9_gate_status_carried_into_draft.data_provenance_locked: 12 CSVs reused byte-equivalent from s16 DR9-passed dir; sealed 245ac0d; result_seal ec856253; sha-verified at BUILD

dr_precedence_chain: DR7 -> DR1 -> DR9 -> DR10 -> DR6 -> DR4 -> DR2 -> DR3 -> DR5

dr_register.DR10_v2: turnover_cost_explosion (turnover>0.50 AND S2_cost_drag>0.05) -> REJECT_FAST. Cash-equity cost_drag CLEARS strong margin
dr_register.DR11: NOT IN CHAIN -- cash equity unlevered
dr_register.DR6: post_warmup_sizing_ambiguity -> REJECT_FAST (per-name; vol-normalized sizing must be valid)
dr_register.DR9: data_continuity (per-name) -> INCONCLUSIVE_HOLD. ALREADY PASSED all 12 by reuse (ec856253)

first_principles_burden.vs_s12_d1_donchian_futures: different asset class (cash equity vs micro-futures), 12-name basket vs single MNQ, periods 20/10 vs 15/8, bi-directional multi-name
first_principles_burden.vs_s15_s14_cross_sector_terminal: NON-mean-reversion FAMILY (trend breakout vs RSI/z-score MR); trailing-stop exit (vs exit-to-mean/RSI-mid); DIFFERENT 12-name universe. Clears T-FORBID-16/17/18.

first_principles_exit_stop_edge_design.exit_design: TRAILING DONCHIAN channel (N_exit=10): close the position when price reverses through the opposite 10-day channel; the trend-following trailing stop (let winners run, cut losers).
first_principles_exit_stop_edge_design.expected_effect_HYPOTHESIS_NOT_CLAIM: A few large trend winners pay for many small losers -> positive expectancy IF the basket/window trends. To be TESTED at P6 IS; not asserted.
first_principles_exit_stop_edge_design.initial_stop_design: 2 x ATR(14) vol-scaled floor from entry; whichever of trailing-channel / ATR-stop triggers first.
first_principles_exit_stop_edge_design.rationale: After s14/s15 mean-reversion terminals on cash equity (edge structurally absent), a trend mechanic inverts the geometry. Expected trend payoff: win<50% but P/L>1 (mirror of the failed mean-reversion win>50%/P/L<1).

k9_reachability_table_draft.k9_binding_low_note: the 12-name expansion exists to make this non-MR mechanic K9-OOS-reachable
k9_reachability_table_draft.rec1_equivalent_disclosure: If observed effective IS rate < 25/y basket-summed -> OOS K9 unreachability probable -> PARK.

k_gates.K10_avg_pairwise_corr: APPLICABLE; expected lower than 3-name basket (12 names ~7 sectors); LOAD-BEARING
k_gates.K12_DR_fires_on_cost_stress: if DR2/3/4/5 fires across S0/S2/S3/S4 -> FAIL_SAFETY

next_phase_authorization_scope.commit_this_draft: Authorize commit s16-d1 expanded-universe trend/breakout Tier-N spec DRAFT only.
next_phase_authorization_scope.primary_forward: Authorize s16-d1 expanded-universe trend/breakout Tier-N spec SEAL only -- bound by DR10 v2.

rec1_equivalent_oos_k9_disclosure: REC1-equivalent (BINDING): OOS K9 reachable on the 12-name basket (expected ~96-180/y). If observed effective IS rate < 25/y basket-summed, OOS K9 unreachability becomes structurally probable -> PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE per precedent. The chain shall NOT relax K9 at OOS.
report_kind: S16-D1 expanded-universe Donchian trend Tier-N spec DRAFT — carries PLAN structural locks + first-principles trailing-stop exit design + reused 12-name DR9 PASS, expands DA register, proposes operational params for SEAL. NOT a Tier-N SEAL.

t_forbid_clearance.T_FORBID_18_reuse_terminal_mechanics: CLEARED (Donchian trend, not RSI(3)+2N or z-score exit-to-mean)

title: s16-d1 expanded-universe Donchian breakout trend (trailing-stop) Tier-N specification DRAFT (12-name; NON-mean-reversion; DR10 v2; DR9 PASSED by reuse; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE)
